package rulecoverage

func NegativeRowsWithoutClose() string {
    ruleID := "rows_without_close"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Query result handles that appear locally owned but have no observed rows.Close() call."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
